description_long: This is a compact, futuristic airplane with a sleek, streamlined fuselage and sharply swept wings that curve gracefully outward. The body is predominantly a deep, metallic red with weathered, silver-gray accents, and features visible insignia on both wings. The nose is pointed and tapers smoothly, while the rear houses a prominent circular exhaust or engine port. Two cylindrical engine pods are mounted on either side of the fuselage, just beneath the wings, suggesting a jet propulsion system. The cockpit is positioned forward and appears to be enclosed, with a dark, tinted canopy integrated into the fuselage. The overall design is reminiscent of a science fiction or advanced military aircraft, with no visible landing gear and a single vertical stabilizer at the rear.
description: A sleek, red and silver futuristic airplane with swept wings, dual side-mounted jet engines, and a forward enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, forward cockpit, and the wide, swept wings with insignia.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the curved wing, side-mounted engine pod, and the single vertical stabilizer at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the circular engine exhaust and the symmetry of the swept wings.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the wing, engine pod, and tail configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with sharply swept wings and no visible winglets; wings are integrated smoothly into the fuselage.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted on either side of the fuselage beneath the wings.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and no visible horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy integrated into the fuselage.
